faqs.question: What is Adomantra and what digital marketing services does it offer?
faqs.answer: Adomantra is an ISO 9001:2015 certified digital advertising agency founded in 2012. It offers end-to-end services including programmatic advertising, PPC, SEO, social media marketing, content marketing, CTV advertising, video advertising, WhatsApp marketing, influencer marketing, rich media, online reputation management, and website & app development.

faqs.question: Which industries does Adomantra serve in India and globally?
faqs.answer: Adomantra works across healthcare, automobile, real estate, travel & hospitality, FMCG & FMCD, education, e-commerce, banking & financial services, IT, and security services. Its client roster includes global brands such as Microsoft, Honda, Hilton, Emirates, Garnier, and Punjab National Bank.

faqs.question: Is Adomantra an award-winning or certified digital agency?
faqs.answer: Yes. Adomantra holds ISO 9001:2015 certification and has received multiple industry recognitions. The agency has also been empanelled by the National e-Governance Division (NeGD) of the Government of India as an official digital media agency.

faqs.question: What makes Adomantra different from other digital marketing agencies in India?
faqs.answer: Adomantra combines data-driven strategy with creative brand building, supported by official partnerships with Google Ads, Google DV360, Facebook, Amazon Ads, Hotstar, JIO, Zee5, Truecaller, Swiggy, and Uber. Its full-funnel approach spans awareness to conversion across all digital channels.

faqs.question: How do I get started with Adomantra for my business?
faqs.answer: You can request a free digital audit directly on the Adomantra website. The team evaluates your current online presence, campaign performance, and goals before recommending a tailored strategy. You can also reach out via the Contact Us page or by submitting a requirement form with your monthly budget.

faqs.question: What is programmatic advertising in India and how does Adomantra use it?
faqs.answer: Programmatic advertising is the automated buying and selling of online ad space using algorithms and real-time bidding (RTB). Adomantra leverages DSPs and DMPs to reach over 1.5 billion audiences across 2,500+ targeting combinations, ensuring ads are served to the right person at the right time across display, mobile, native, CTV, and video formats.
